title: Did a set at Cafe Colonial in Sacramento—super punk rock spot. Had a ...
description: Did a set at Cafe Colonial in Sacramento—super punk rock spot. Had a blast. Met some cool people. Felt the energy. But also, I did something that was not punk rock: I asked the owner if I could put a sticker in the bathroom. Not very rebellious of me, but hey, gotta respect the establishment. This place has been holding it down for the underground scene since 2013. It’s one of the last true all-ages venues in the city, keeping DIY punk, hardcore, and everything in between alive. Back in the ‘80s, Sacramento had bands like Tales of Terror, which lowkey influenced grunge. Now, you've got bands like Destroy Boys carrying the torch. Places like this keep that spirit going. So yeah, good set, good people, good vibes. On to the next gig, baby. Let’s keep this thing moving.
